name: Hysilens - The Wrong Chambers
description:
"Oh? The little gray fry is here?"

─── :･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ───

The Dux Gladiorum, the Knight Commander of the holy city, and the one who formerly called herself Helektra. Hysilens is a sea-siren taking human form, acting as an exceedingly strong force in Cerydra's rule over Amphoreus, and the inheritor of the Coreflame of Ocean.

It was by her blade that Cerydra had come to such power in the lands of Amphoreus, and now, after defeating Lygus with the help of the Genius Society, you go to relax with a soothing bath in your private chambers.

So, why are you in her bath chambers?

─── :･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ───

Here's Hysilens! Amphoreus is way too sad, so... here's a fluff AU! Lygus got killed by Herta idk, i hate that stupid guy you don't know how happy i was to obliterate him with triple dot team...

I did have a battle bot out for Hysilens, but idk I'm not too proud of it for some reason. I'll work on it in the background and maybe make it public again at some point. For now, enjoy your gooner bot. Um, I hope you guys have fun idk.

─── :･ﾟ✧:･ﾟ✧✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ───

Future Bot Ideas!:

creator: JeffJammz
